name: Artichoke Tart in Walnut Pastry
recipeIngredient: 8 T Cold unsalted butter, cut into pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F (190°C) for 10 minutes.
2. Saute scallions and garlic in butter until softened.
3. Cut artichoke hearts from jar into bite-sized pieces.
4. Combine cream, eggs, salt, and pepper in a medium bowl.
5. Sprinkle grated Gruyere cheese over the bottom of the partially baked crust.
6. Bake for 35 minutes until golden and slightly puffy. Let rest for 10 minutes.
WALNUT PASTRY
1. Process walnuts until coarsely ground.
2. Add flour and salt to work into a coarse mixture.
3. Place pieces of butter atop dry ingredients and pulse until the mixture resembles breadcrumbs.
4. Add egg and process just until the mixture begins to hold together.
5. Remove dough from processor and shape into a flattened disc. Cover
6. Roll dough out large enough to fit into a 10-inch quiche or tart pan.
7. Line chilled pastry with a large sheet of aluminum foil and fill with
